checks.reason: The node is anchored to the Smithsonian Qafzeh intentional burial evidence at about 100,000 years old.
Red ocher is documented near the Qafzeh bones, but pigment practice is contextual rather than a universal hard prerequisite for burial.
The corrected node should not depend directly on the later broad symbolic-communication placeholder.
Intentional burial evidence should not be laundered into ancestor-worship claims without a source.
The Qafzeh mortuary evidence should not imply tribal political organization as a direct prerequisite.
